mnemonics: TRES stands for Tree Relatively Easy to Search
BILLY is a tree where each node has a maximum of two children
keyPoints: A tree is a non-linear data structure consisting of nodes
A binary tree is a tree in which each node has at most two children
Threaded binary tree is a binary tree where each edge is labeled with a 0 or 1
A threaded binary tree is used to reduce the time complexity of traversals
